code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{createBooking}from'../api';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const BookingPage=()=>{const[date,setDate]=useState('');const[serviceType,setServiceType]=useState('');const token=localStorage.getItem('token');const handleBooking=async()=>{try{await createBooking({date,serviceType},token);alert('Booking successful!');}catch(error){alert('Booking failed');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container mx-auto p-6",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-3xl font-bold",children:"Book a Photography Session"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"date",value:date,onChange:e=>setDate(e.target.value),className:"mt-4 p-2 border rounded"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("select",{value:serviceType,onChange:e=>setServiceType(e.target.value),className:"mt-4 p-2 border rounded",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"",children:"Select a service"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"Portrait",children:"Portrait"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"Wedding",children:"Wedding"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"Event",children:"Event"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:handleBooking,className:"mt-4 bg-blue-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded",children:"Confirm Booking"})]});};export default BookingPage;
